name: Macaroni Medley Salad
recipeIngredient: 15 ounces Canned kidney beans -- drained and rinsed
10 ounces Frozen green beans, cooked, drained and cooled
8 ounces Fat-free cheddar cheese -- Healthy Choice, cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the buttermilk, mayonnaise, and dill.
2. Pour the mixture over the combined pasta, beans, and cheese.
3. Mix lightly until all ingredients are evenly coated.
4. Chill before serving.
